Module 7
About David H. Lawrence XVII…
• David is an American television and film actor,
voice talent, network radio host, Internet
entrepreneur, podcaster, demo producer,
teacher and author, best known for his role as
The Puppetmaster on NBC's sci-fi series Heroes

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Program…
• VO2GoGo.com
• Online course in how to be a successful voice
over artist
Background…
• “I'd been kind of launching, but not
wholeheartedly, for the 8 years or so that I'd been
teaching my course. I'd won a number of awards
for the class, and I decided to get serious about
it.“
• So after one serious non-JV launch (netted $51k
in the first serious launch, as opposed to the
occasional sales that came in over the first 8
years), I organized a serious set of JVs (adjacent
to me in the industry), and ended up grossing
$137k. I paid out around $40k to to my JV
partners, and I more than doubled my list size.”
For this JV Launch…
• 6 JV partners made a sale
• #1 had 11 sales
• #2 had 5 sales
• #3 had 2 sales
• The rest (3 people) had 1 sale each
• Total JV Sales: 21

• Via one-on-one personal outreach, either by
phone, email or both

be a JV, and a simple signup page when they
indicate interest

JV Emails
Launch: VO2GoGo.com (Online course in how to be a successful voice over artist)
[2018 JVs] Sample Copy - 1st Video - MONDAY
--------------- IMPORTANT TAKEAWAYS ---------------
Tell the story your way. Don’t sell. Tell.
Use the “swipe” copy below as a starter
Be sure to “tune” your copy to the event
DON’T SEND OUT YOUR LINK UNTIL MONDAY
Hey there!
This is an email that’s one of the longest, because
it’s got five different samples of copy to use for the
first day of the launch.
The copy below is formatted with subject lines and
body content, but you can (and should) use the
same copy you come up with for social media
messaging.
You’ll want to copy and paste your selected copy
out of this email, into your favorite text editor
or word processor, and then make the copy your own.
Along those lines, this came in from one of your
fellow affiliates yesterday:
--- begin email ---
David, not to be negative or anything, but I'm a
terrible sales person. I will do my best, but if
I don't succeed, it won't be for a lack of sharing
how great your classes are. :)
--- end email ---
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 15 --

The good news is, you don’t have to be a great sales
person, you just have to be what you already are: a
great storyteller.
As I share this sample “swipe” copy with you (it’s called
“swipe” copy in the industry because you can “swipe”
it from me and use it) think about how you know me
and how you know the course.
If you’ve taken the VO2GoGo curriculum, you could talk
about the classes, what you’ve gotten out of them, your
successes and challenges, the help you’ve received, the
feelings you have about working with me and so on.
If you haven’t taken the classes, just speak from the
heart on how the free training and curriculum could
be just what the person needs, how it can expand
their acting career, how it can become a second
source of income, how being a VO talent can make
them a better on-camera talent, how you know me
and why you want to share what I have to teach with
your tribe members...your choice.
Notice, I didn’t say “sell them on VO2GoGo.” Nope.
No need to sell. Just tell. Tell your story of you and them.
You’ll see what I mean from the swipe copy below.
NOTE: When getting ready to email or message on
social media, make sure to double and triple check
that you’ve replaced
PasteYourAffiliateLinkHere
...with your actual affiliate link, and that you’ve
replaced
YourNameHere
...with your actual name. You wouldn’t believe how
embarrassing it could be to let that slip out into the wild.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Swipe Copy For The First Lesson (12/4)
At midnight Sunday night, Monday morning, the first
lesson of three in the VO Booking Blueprint will be
released. I’ll be talking about three things VO talent
can do to increase their booking rate, and will be
giving more information in the second and third video
about the same thing.
SAMPLE EMAIL SUBJECT LINES
(You can use any of these - feel free to alter them
to match whatever your body copy talks about.
TIP: keep the length of your subject lines short,
so that they are easily visible in their entirety when
your tribe members look at their inbox.)
SUBJ: {video} How VO pros book more often
SUBJ: {video} Booking skills for new VO talent
SUBJ: {video} Lots of VO auditions, but no VO jobs?
SUBJ: {video} One simple way to book more VO work
SUBJ: {video} Do this one thing right to raise your booking rate
SUBJ: {video} Are you a VO dreamer or a VO doer?
SUBJ: {video} The right VO projects to audition for
SUBJ: {video} Adding VO to your acting portfolio
SUBJ: {video} Tired as hell of auditioning and not booking?
